article_title: Quantum Corridor Deploys First Quantum Computer on North America's Only Interstate Quantum-Safe Commercial Network

content_preview.title: Quantum Corridor Deploys First Quantum Computer on North America's Only Interstate Quantum-Safe Commercial Network
content_preview.summary: Quantum Computing Inc. installed its Dirac-3 quantum optimization machine on the Quantum Corridor network connecting Chicago and Hammond, Indiana, marking the first time a quantum computer has been deployed on a QKD-secured commercial fiber network spanning U.S. state lines.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Quantum Computing Inc. (QCi) announced on March 30 that it has installed its Dirac-3 quantum optimization machine at the Digital Crossroad Data Center in Hammond, Indiana, making it the first quantum computer deployed on a quantum key distribution-secured commercial network spanning U.S. state lines. The machine sits on Quantum Corridor, an interstate fiber network connecting Chicago's ORD 10 Data Center to Hammond that operates as [North America's first quantum-safe commercial comm...

editor_notes.content_quality: Good quantum networking article with infrastructure deployment details.
editor_notes.source_verification: PR Newswire (x2) and The Quantum Insider — authoritative sources.
